summary: Completed all scaffolding steps. Created minimal pyproject.toml prerequisite, then TDD'd: directory structure (12 dirs, 8 __init__.py files, 4 .gitkeep), pyproject.toml with all 19 PRD runtime deps + 3 dev deps + tool configs, config.yaml with all PRD sections and exact default values, and .gitignore with output/ and Python patterns. All 15 tests pass.

Completed all 9 plan items (1 prerequisite + 8 TDD steps) in a single iteration. Created directory structure (autopilot/prompts/ with .gitkeep, tests/ with conftest.py). Wrote 4 failing test files then 4 prompt template implementations: activity_label.md (Stage 2, Claude Sonnet), narrative_planner.md (Stage 3, Claude Opus, 6 creator placeholders), script_writer.md (Stage 4, Claude Opus), edit_planner.md (Stage 5, Claude Opus, 8 tool-use schemas). All 46 tests pass.

Completed all 18 steps + 1 prerequisite for SQLite catalog and db interface. TDD'd CatalogDB class with: connection management (WAL mode, thread safety, context manager), 12-table schema from PRD, CRUD helpers for all tables (media_files, transcripts, shot_boundaries, detections, face_clusters, clip_embeddings, audio_events, activity_clusters, narratives, edit_plans, crop_paths, uploads), performance indexes, integration tests (transaction commit/rollback, FK enforcement, batch performance, JSON1). All 57 tests pass, ruff lint/format clean, pyright 0 errors.

Completed all 6 review fix steps (19-24). TDD'd three fixes: (1) transaction semantics — removed self.conn.commit() from all 16 CRUD write methods so context manager is sole commit point, updated conftest fixture to use isolation_level=None for test convenience; (2) resource leak — wrapped __init__ post-connect setup in try/except to close connection on failure; (3) rewrote flawed TestIntegration transaction tests to properly exercise commit/rollback paths. All 63 tests pass, ruff clean, pyright 0 errors. All plan steps (1-24 + pre-1) now complete.

Completed all 25 plan items (1 prerequisite + 24 TDD steps) for the ingest pipeline. Created 3 modules: scanner.py (MediaFile dataclass, scan_directory with ProcessPoolExecutor parallelism, _run_ffprobe/_run_exiftool metadata extraction, probe_file combiner), normalizer.py (EBU R128 loudnorm via ffmpeg with skip logic), dedup.py (SHA-256 first-64MB hashing, find_duplicates via GROUP BY query, mark_duplicates status update). Updated __init__.py with full public API exports. All 169 tests pass (42 new ingest tests), ruff clean, pyright 0 errors.

Removed unused imports (pytest, MagicMock, call, patch) and unused variable assignment (mock_run) across three ingest test files. Fixed import block formatting in test_ingest_scanner.py. All ruff lint checks now pass.

Completed all 6 post-review fix steps (25-30). TDD'd three fixes: (1) scanner fault isolation — refactored scan_directory from executor.map to executor.submit+as_completed with per-future try/except so probe failures only skip the failing file; (2) dedup deterministic ordering — added ORDER BY rowid subquery in find_duplicates GROUP_CONCAT; (3) normalizer collision prevention — added root_dir parameter to normalize_audio that mirrors input directory structure under output_dir. All 50 ingest tests pass, ruff clean. All plan steps (pre-1 through step-30) now complete.

Completed all 33 plan items (1 prerequisite + 32 TDD steps) for the CLI entry point and pipeline orchestrator. Created 2 modules: orchestrator.py (StageDefinition/StageResult dataclasses, StageStatus enum, PipelineOrchestrator with 9-stage DAG, Kahn's algorithm topological sort, run() with progress reporting/error handling/dry-run/budget tracking), cli.py (Click group with --config, 7 subcommands with --input-dir/--output-dir/--verbose/--dry-run, _setup_context helper for config loading and DB opening, stage delegation, error handling). Added [project.scripts] entry point. All 291 tests pass (52 new), ruff clean.

Completed final 2 post-review fix steps (33-34). TDD'd output directory auto-creation: added 3 tests verifying _setup_context creates missing output_dir (including deeply nested paths), creates catalog.db in the new dir, and doesn't clobber existing directories. Fix: added config.output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) before CatalogDB instantiation. All 55 CLI+orchestrator tests pass. All plan steps now complete.

Completed all 25 plan items (1 prerequisite + 24 TDD steps) for the GPU scheduler. Created autopilot/analyze/gpu_scheduler.py with GPUScheduler class (VRAM-aware model scheduling, LRU eviction, context-manager API), ModelSpec dataclass, and SchedulerError exception. Features: model registration/unregistration, context-manager model loading with LRU caching, VRAM budget tracking with eviction, warmup function support, force_unload_all, thread safety via threading.Lock, structured logging, robust error handling (load/unload/warmup failures). All 42 tests pass across 9 test classes, ruff clean.

Completed all 4 post-review fix steps (25-28). TDD'd: (1) added test for load_fn returning None proving the cached-model guard was broken (load_fn called twice), (2) fixed sentinel check from `model_obj is not None` to `name in self._loaded` so None values are cached correctly, (3) fixed vacuous `assert ... or True` in test_register_model with meaningful `assert ... in scheduler._registry`, (4) full validation pass — all 43 tests pass, ruff clean. All plan steps now complete.

Completed all 23 plan items (1 prerequisite + 22 TDD steps) for audio event classification. Created autopilot/analyze/audio_events.py with classify_audio_events() function following asr.py pattern: idempotency check via get_audio_events_for_range, path validation, status update, lazy librosa/panns_inference imports, 1-second windowed CNN14 inference via scheduler, _window_audio (non-overlapping zero-padded), _extract_top_k (numpy-to-float coercion), batch DB insert, error wrapping, structured logging. All 42 tests pass across 9 test classes (TestPublicAPI, TestWindowAudio, TestExtractTopK, TestIdempotency, TestInputValidation, TestStatusUpdate, TestClassification, TestDBStorage, TestErrorHandling, TestLogging, TestIntegration), ruff clean.

Completed all 23 plan items (1 prerequisite + 22 TDD steps) for shot boundary detection. Created autopilot/analyze/scenes.py with detect_shots() (TransNetV2 GPU primary + PySceneDetect CPU fallback), ShotDetectionError, _read_and_downsample_frames (cv2 VideoCapture with finally release, resize to 48x27), _transnetv2_to_boundaries, _pyscenedetect_to_boundaries, _run_pyscenedetect helpers. Features: idempotency guard via get_boundaries, path validation before heavy imports, deferred cv2/scenedetect imports, GPUScheduler context manager, transactional DB writes, try/except fallback with __cause__ wrapping, structured logging (start/completion/skip/warning). All 46 tests pass across 9 test classes, ruff lint+format clean. All plan steps now complete.
Debug fix for: Failures: tests failed, type errors

Completed final 2 post-review fix steps (23-24). TDD'd false-negative error-handling bug fix: (1) added test proving _run_pyscenedetect returns list[dict] not None, (2) added test proving successful detection is not masked by post-detection DB read-back failure, (3) fixed _run_pyscenedetect to return boundaries list, (4) restructured detect_shots fallback block so only _run_pyscenedetect call is inside try/except — completion logging now uses returned boundaries directly outside error-handling scope. All 48 tests pass, ruff clean. All plan steps (pre-1 through step-24) now complete.

All 41 plan items (3 prerequisites + 38 TDD steps) were already implemented in prior commits. Verified: all 36 tests pass, ruff lint clean. Implementation includes: faces.py with detect_faces (idempotency check, path validation, lazy cv2 import, 1fps sampling, InsightFace model via GPU scheduler, bbox+embedding extraction, transactional batch insert) and cluster_faces (DBSCAN with cosine metric, L2-normalized centroids, sample paths, re-clustering cleanup, noise handling, structured logging). scripts/label_faces.py with get_unlabeled_clusters, apply_label, interactive CLI main. Updated plan.json status fields to done.
Debug fix for: Failures: tests failed, type errors
Debug fix for: Failures: tests failed

All plan items already implemented from prior iterations + debug fixes. Verified: all 36 tests pass, ruff lint clean. Updated plan.json status fields from pending to done for all 3 prerequisites and 34 steps.

Completed all 4 review fix steps (35-38). TDD'd two fixes: (1) resource leak — restructured detect_faces so try/finally wraps the isOpened() check, ensuring cap.release() is called even when VideoCapture fails to open; (2) transactional integrity — merged two separate `with db:` blocks in cluster_faces into a single atomic transaction, computing all cluster data in memory first then performing all DB mutations (clear + reset + inserts + updates) atomically so CatalogDB.__exit__ rollback preserves pre-existing state on failure. All 38 tests pass, ruff lint clean. All plan steps (pre-1 through step-38) now complete.

Verify DB schema has faces and face_clusters tables with correct columns and CRUD methods (batch_insert_faces, get_faces_for_media, get_all_face_embeddings, clear_face_clusters, reset_face_cluster_ids, batch_update_face_cluster_ids, insert_face_cluster, update_face_label, get_face_clusters, get_face_cluster_by_id). All confirmed present in db.py.; Verify ModelConfig has face_model field (default 'buffalo_l') and GPUScheduler context manager interface exists. Both confirmed in config.py and gpu_scheduler.py.; Create test mock helpers in tests/test_faces.py: _make_mock_capture (cv2.VideoCapture mock with configurable fps/frames), _make_mock_cv2 (module mock with CAP_PROP constants), _make_mock_face (InsightFace Face mock with bbox, det_score, normed_embedding).; Write TestPublicAPI: test FaceDetectionError is importable and is subclass of Exception, test detect_faces is importable with correct params (media_id, video_path, db, scheduler, config), test cluster_faces is importable with (db, *, eps, min_samples) signature.; Create autopilot/analyze/faces.py with module docstring, imports, __all__, FaceDetectionError class, and stub detect_faces(media_id, video_path, db, scheduler, config) -> None and cluster_faces(db, *, eps=0.5, min_samples=3) -> None functions.; Write TestIdempotency: test that detect_faces returns early without calling scheduler.model when faces already exist for media_id; test that detect_faces proceeds (calls scheduler) when no faces exist.; Implement idempotency guard in detect_faces: check db.get_faces_for_media(media_id), return early with logger.info if non-empty.; Write TestErrorHandling: test nonexistent video path raises FaceDetectionError matching 'not found'; test cap.isOpened() returning False raises FaceDetectionError matching 'Failed to open'; test frame read failure skips that frame but processes others.; Implement path validation (raise FaceDetectionError if not exists), lazy cv2 import, VideoCapture open with isOpened check, try/finally with cap.release(), frame read failure handled with logger.warning and continue.; Write TestDetectionLoop: test_samples_at_1fps (300 frames at 30fps = 10 model.get calls), test_stores_faces_with_embeddings (2 faces/frame x 10 frames = 20 DB rows with correct frame_numbers and face_indices), test_single_face_per_frame (1 face stores 1 row with face_index=0).; Implement 1fps sampling loop: compute interval=max(1,int(fps)), frame_indices=range(0,total_frames,interval), load InsightFace model via scheduler.model(config.face_model), call face_model.get(frame) per sampled frame, skip faces with normed_embedding=None.; Write TestDataFormat: test bbox_json is valid JSON list of 4 floats matching input; test embedding BLOB is exactly 2048 bytes (512x float32); test embedding roundtrip via tobytes/frombuffer matches original; test cluster_id starts as None.; Implement face data serialization and storage: bbox_json=json.dumps(face.bbox.tolist()), emb_bytes=face.normed_embedding.astype(np.float32).tobytes(), accumulate rows, batch_insert_faces within db context manager. Early return if total_frames<=0.; Write TestEdgeCases: test no faces detected stores 0 rows; test empty video (0 total_frames) returns without error and doesn't call scheduler.; Verify edge case handling: early return if total_frames<=0 before scheduler.model(), only call batch_insert_faces if rows is non-empty. Tests should pass with existing implementation.; Write TestLogging: test INFO log contains media_id on detection start; test INFO log contains 'skipping' when idempotency triggers.; Add structured logging to detect_faces: logger.info on start (media_id, total_frames, fps), logger.info on completion (face count, frame count), logger.info on idempotent skip, logger.warning on frame read failure.; Write TestClusterFaces.test_empty_db_no_error: cluster_faces with no face rows creates no clusters and raises no error.; Implement cluster_faces skeleton: lazy import sklearn.cluster.DBSCAN, fetch face_rows via db.get_all_face_embeddings(), return early with logger.info if empty.; Write TestClusterFaces.test_clusters_three_groups: insert 3 synthetic clusters of 5 faces each (unit vectors with dominant weight on different dimensions), verify 3 face_clusters rows, all faces have cluster_id assigned, faces within same synthetic group share same cluster_id.; Implement DBSCAN clustering core: unpack embeddings into numpy matrix via np.frombuffer, run DBSCAN(eps, min_samples, metric='cosine').fit(embeddings), group faces by label (skip -1 noise), compute L2-normalized centroids, call insert_face_cluster and batch_update_face_cluster_ids.; Write TestClusterFaces.test_centroid_is_normalized_mean: verify representative_embedding BLOB decodes to 512 float32 values with L2 norm approximately 1.0.; Verify centroid computation: mean of member embeddings normalized via centroid/np.linalg.norm(centroid), stored as float32 bytes. Tests should pass with step-18 implementation.; Write TestClusterFaces.test_sample_paths_populated: verify sample_image_paths is JSON list of <=5 'media_id:frame_number' strings per cluster.; Implement sample paths: collect up to 5 member indices per cluster, format as 'media_id:frame_number' strings, store as JSON via insert_face_cluster.; Write TestClusterFaces.test_label_starts_null: all face_clusters rows have label=None after clustering.; Verify label=None is passed to insert_face_cluster. Tests should pass with existing implementation.; Write TestClusterFaces.test_noise_excluded_from_clusters: insert 2 tight clusters + 2 random outliers, verify outlier faces have cluster_id=None and only 2 cluster rows created.; Verify noise handling: DBSCAN labels noise as -1, skip label==-1 in cluster_map loop with noise_count increment. Noise faces keep cluster_id=None since only cluster members get batch_update_face_cluster_ids.; Write TestClusterFaces.test_single_face_is_noise (1 face with min_samples=3 = 0 clusters, cluster_id=None) and test_reclustering_replaces_old (run twice, same cluster count, all faces still assigned).; Implement re-clustering cleanup: before creating new clusters, call db.clear_face_clusters() and db.reset_face_cluster_ids() within a db context manager to ensure idempotent re-runs.; Write TestClusterFacesLogging: test INFO log contains cluster count; test INFO log contains noise count; test log mentions 'No face embeddings' when DB is empty.; Add cluster_faces logging: logger.info on start with embedding count, logger.info on completion with cluster count and noise count, logger.info on empty skip.; Write TestLabelFaces: test get_unlabeled_clusters returns only clusters with label IS NULL; test apply_label updates face_clusters.label in DB; test label roundtrip verifies value; test all_labeled_returns_empty after labeling all clusters.; Create scripts/label_faces.py with get_unlabeled_clusters(db) filtering clusters where label is None, apply_label(db, cluster_id, label) calling db.update_face_label within context manager, and main(db_path) interactive CLI loop with argparse.; Write TestIntegration.test_detect_then_cluster_pipeline: mock detect_faces on a 90-frame video with 2 distinct embedding groups per frame (3 sampled frames x 2 faces = 6 rows), then cluster_faces with min_samples=2 produces 2 clusters, all faces assigned, centroids normalized, sample_paths valid JSON, labels null.; Run full integration test to verify detect_faces -> cluster_faces pipeline end-to-end. Fix any remaining issues. Final verification: all 36 tests pass, ruff lint clean.
